spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Agility (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You are under the effect of the jump spell during the effect. Kibbles' Occultist
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Armor (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You are under the effect of the mage armor spell during the effect.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Fist (Kibbles)
spell.text:
Prerequisite: Spellfist
The damage of your unarmed strike increases to 1d10. If you expend a 3rd-level spell slot on this Aegis Effect, it increases to 1d12.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Swiftness (Kibbles)
spell.text:
Your movement speed is increased by 5 feet.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Elemental Enchantment (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You touch a weapon converting its damage type to Fire, Cold, or Lightning while you wield it.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Enchanted Shield (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You touch a shield making it easy to wield. You have proficiency with that shield during the effect.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Surging Saves (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You can use your Arcane Surge to add your Intelligence modifier to Strength or Dexterity saving throws as well as ability checks (no action required), expending a use as you would to empower an ability check.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Warding Barrier (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You reduce all damage taken by 1.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Weapon Focus (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You turn your weapon into an arcane focus for your Spellblade spells.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Eyes (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You gain the ability to see in the dark. You have darkvision out to a range of 60 feet during the effect.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Style (Kibbles)
spell.text:
While this Aegis is active, you gain one Fighting Style option of your choice from the Fighter class. If you already have a style, the one you choose must be different.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Skill (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Blade Channel (Kibbles)
spell.text:
When you can cast a spell using Spellstrike, you can use the ability modifier used to attack with that weapon instead of your Intelligence for the spellcasting ability modifier.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Illusionary Ally (Kibbles)
spell.text:
When you roll initiative, you create a single duplicate as per the mirror image spell. You can only have one duplicate at a time from this effect. If you cast mirror image during the effect, the spell remains the same, but the first time an image is lost, this duplicate is destroyed instead.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Loyal Weapon (Kibbles)
spell.text:
A weapon you touch as part of selecting this Aegis is under the effect of returning weapon.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Quickened Movement (Kibbles)
spell.text:
Your movement speed is increased by 5 feet.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Aether Barrier (Kibbles)
spell.text:
Prerequisite: Aether Blade only
When you deal damage with your Aether Blade, you gain temporary hit points equal to your Intelligence modifier.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Overflow (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You gain an additional use of your Arcane Surge feature.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Shield (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You can create a shield of arcane power that protects you, blocking incoming attacks. You gain a +2 to AC as if you had a shield equipped. This counts as an equipped shield but does not require the use of your hand, and you cannot benefit from both this and an equipped shield.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Reflective Aegis (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You have advantage on saving throws against spells that effect a line, and when you pass a saving throw against a spell that deals damage, you reflect part of the damage causing the caster to take half the damage failing the spell save would have dealt to you.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Resistance (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You gain resistance to acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder damage during the effect. You may select a new damage type when you select this Aegis again.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Combat Contingency (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You incorporate a contingency for rapidly deploying combat magic into your Aegis. When you roll initiative, as a reaction you can cast one spell of 3rd level or lower spell that affects only you and has a casting time of 1 action.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Dimensional Pathways (Kibbles)
spell.text:
When you use Arcane Surge to teleport, you can take one willing Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet of you with you, teleporting them to within 5 feet of your destination.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Phantom Aegis (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You can move in brief bursts of intangibility. You can move through the spaces of other creatures (allied or hostile) without any penalty to your movement, and can pass through objects and nonmagical barriers as thick as 1 inch.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Runic Strength (Kibbles)
spell.text:
Your Strength score becomes equal to your Intelligence score during the effect.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Flight (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You gain a flying speed of 30 feet during the effect.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Arcane Alacrity (Kibbles)
spell.text:
When you take the Attack action, you can attack twice, instead of once.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Resilient Aegis (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You gain proficiency in one Saving Throw of your choice during the effect.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)

spell.name: Spellblade Aegis: Stone Aegis (Kibbles)
spell.text:
You reduce all damage taken by 5.
Source: Kibbles Spellblade (Third Party)
